config.loot_journal.group.elements.desc: Controls the layout and arrangement of elements in the pickup message.
config.loot_journal.group.pulse.desc: When a pickup updates during its lifetime (for example, when collecting more of the same item), it briefly pulses to highlight the change.
config.loot_journal.group.specialEffects: Global settings for special effects used by themes.
config.loot_journal.option.activeTheme.d:
Themes define the visual style of the Loot Journal. They control layouts, styles, and effects, and can be customized or added through resource packs.

Themes can also apply different visuals to items using flexible filters and may include their own settings.
config.loot_journal.option.activeTheme.l: Options below are provided by themes from resource packs and may change depending on enabled packs.
config.loot_journal.option.anchorXOffset: Horizontal offset from the screen anchor.
config.loot_journal.option.anchorYOffset: Vertical offset from the screen anchor.
config.loot_journal.option.defaultFilter:
Defines how item filtering works by default.

§fALLOW_ALL§7 – all items are shown by default. Blacklisted items are hidden. (Whitelist is ignored)

§fDENY_ALL§7 – no items are shown by default. Only whitelisted items are displayed. (Blacklist is ignored)
config.loot_journal.option.displayCapaci: Maximum number of pickups visible at the same time.
config.loot_journal.option.displayTime.d: How long a pickup stays visible before fading out.
Controls the layout of the pickup message. Use §fICON§7, §fNAME§7, §fCOUNT§7, and §fTOTAL§7 to define the order, and add numbers to adjust spacing.
config.loot_journal.option.elementPaddin: Bottom padding of the pickup message.
Left padding of the pickup message.
Right padding of the pickup message.
Top padding of the pickup message.
config.loot_journal.option.enableFilteri: Enables or disables filtering of pickups.
config.loot_journal.option.enableLootJou: Completely enables or disables all Loot Journal features.
config.loot_journal.option.enablePlayerF: When enabled, only players from the whitelist will be tracked.
config.loot_journal.option.enableRayGlow: Enables or disables the ray glow effect across all themes.
Enables or disables the pickup sound.
Controls the shape of the fade-in animation.
config.loot_journal.option.fadeOutEasing: Controls the shape of the fade-out animation.
config.loot_journal.option.growthDirecti:
Controls the direction in which new pickups appear.

§fNATURAL§7 – follows the Screen Anchor setting, using the most natural direction for the chosen position.

§fUP§7 – new entries grow upward from the anchor.

§fDOWN§7 – new entries grow downward from the anchor.
config.loot_journal.option.hideOtherComm: Skips displaying common items picked up by other players, keeping your Loot Journal focused on noteworthy finds.
config.loot_journal.option.hideYourCommo: Skips displaying common items you pick up, keeping your Loot Journal focused on noteworthy finds.
config.loot_journal.option.itemIdBlackli: Items with these IDs will be hidden.
config.loot_journal.option.itemIdWhiteli: Items with these IDs will be shown.
config.loot_journal.option.itemTagBlackl: Items with these tags will be hidden.
config.loot_journal.option.itemTagWhitel: Items with these tags will be shown.
Maximum width of the pickup name text.
config.loot_journal.option.mergeMode.des:
Determines how pickup entries are combined together.

§fTYPE_NAMED§7 – merges items by type, but items with custom names are never merged.

§fTYPE§7 – merges items by type, ignoring NBT and custom names.

§fSTRICT§7 – merges only identical items, including NBT.

§fNONE§7 – disables merging. Every pickup is shown separately.
config.loot_journal.option.modIdBlacklis: Items from these mods will be hidden.
config.loot_journal.option.modIdWhitelis: Items from these mods will be shown.
config.loot_journal.option.playerWhiteli: List of players whose pickups will be tracked.
config.loot_journal.option.pulseEaseIn.d: Controls the shape of how the pulse builds up to its peak.
Controls the shape of how the pulse fades after reaching its peak.
config.loot_journal.option.pulsePeak.des: Controls when the pulse reaches its peak during its duration (0 = start, 1 = end).
config.loot_journal.option.pulseStrength: Controls how strong the pulse effect appears.
config.loot_journal.option.queueSize.des: Maximum number of pickups stored in the queue.
config.loot_journal.option.scale.desc: Overall size of the Loot Journal.
Determines which corner of the screen the Loot Journal is attached to.

§fTOP_LEFT§7 – anchored to the top-left corner.

§fTOP_RIGHT§7 – anchored to the top-right corner.

§fBOTTOM_LEFT§7 – anchored to the bottom-left corner.

§fBOTTOM_RIGHT§7 – anchored to the bottom-right corner.
config.loot_journal.option.showOverflowP: Shows a combined pickup when too many items are collected at once.
config.loot_journal.option.soundId.desc: Selects which sound is played for pickups.
config.loot_journal.option.soundPitch.de: Changes the pitch of the pickup sound. Lower values make it deeper, higher values make it higher.
config.loot_journal.option.soundVolume.d: Controls how loud the pickup sound is.
Controls how entries are placed on the screen.

§fSMOOTH_FLOW§7 – new entries appear at the start and smoothly push older ones along the list. Entries constantly adjust their position, with no empty gaps.

§fFIXED_SLOTS§7 – each entry stays in its own slot and never moves. Empty slots remain, and new entries fill the ones closest to the start.
config.loot_journal.option.trackItemPick: Shows item pickups from nearby players.
config.loot_journal.option.trackXpPickup: Shows experience pickups from nearby players.
config.loot_journal.option.tracking.labe: Tracking allows you to see when other players obtain items. However, it only works for players who are nearby and currently loaded. You can avoid being tracked by becoming §finvisible§7 or by wearing a §fcarved pumpkin§7.
config.loot_journal.theme.name_color.des: Color of the pickup's name text.
config.loot_journal.theme.pickup_count_c: Color of the amount of items just picked up.
config.loot_journal.theme.total_count_co: Color of the total amount of this item currently in the inventory.
